---
title: "Diagrams"
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

System Architecture of CDEX to know how all the components of the CDEX ecosystem fit together.
```{mermaid}
graph TB 
subgraph External["External data Sources"]
   PARQUET["PArquet Files <br/>(SDTM/ADAM)"]
   SAS["SAS/XPT Files <brl> Legacy"]
   RDS["Cached RDS<br/> (data a1.rds)"]
end
subgraph ConfigLayer["Configration Layer"]
   YAML[" 3- Tier YAML Config<br/> default -> TA -> Study"]
   HOOKS["Hook System <br/> (derive_adam.R, derive_cdex.R)"]
   REGISTERY["study registory <br/> (inst/config.yaml)"]
end 
subgraph CoreEngine["Core Engine (R6 Classes)"]
    SETTINGS["Settings calss <br/> UI choices, atributes, <br/> factor level"]
    APP["App Class <br/> module assembly, <br/> CDISC datasets"]
    STUDY_SPEC["Study Specs(123) <br/> {SUDY_ID}Settings <br/> {SUDY_ID}App"]
end
subgraph ModuleLayer["Visualization Modules"]
    TM_G["tm_g_* (44) <br/> Graphical Modules <br/> ggplot2/ggiraph/d3.js"]
    TM_T["tm_t_* (11) <br/> tabular Modules <br/> rtables"]
    TM_X["tm_x_* (4) <br/> Special Modules <br/> chatgpt luna"]
    CDEX_M["cdex_* (11) <br/> CDEX Modules <br/> km, CIF, Summaries"]
end
subgraph UILayer["UI / Presentation"]
    TEAL["Teal Freamwork"]
    BSLIB["bslib"]
    SHINY["shiny"]
    D3["D3.js htmlwidgets <br/> (AE Timelines)"]
end
subgraph Deployment["Deployment"]
    POSIT["Posit Connect <br/> (dev/qc/prod)"]
end
PARQUET --> CoreEngine
SAS--> CoreEngine
RDS--> CoreEngine 
YAML--> SETTINGS
HOOKS --> CoreEngine
REGISTERY--> CoreEngine
SETTINGS --> APP
STUDY_SPEC --> SETTINGS 
STUDY_SPEC --> APP
APP --> TM_G & TM_T & TM_X & CDEX_M
TM_G & TM_T & TM_X & CDEX_M --> TEAL
TEAL --> BSLIB --> SHINY
D3 --> SHINY
SHINY --> POSIT

style External fill: #e8f4fd, storke: #2196F3
style ConfigLayer fill: #fff3e0, storke: #ff9800
style CoreEngine fill: #e8f5e9, storke: #4caf50 
style ModuleLayer fill: #f3e5f5, storke: #9c27bo
style UILayer fill: #fce4ec, storke: #e91e63
style Deployment fill: #e0f2f1, storke: #009688 

```
Extact 11-steps to make-app() startup flow from run_app.R, showing how data, settings, and modules are assembled at runtime.
```{mermaid}
sequenceDiagram
participant User as User
participant RunApp as make_app()
participant Theme as ggplot2
participant Data as Data Pipeline
participant Settings as {Study}Settings
participant App as {Study}App
participant Teal as teal::init()
User -->> RunApp: make_app(study, env)
Note over RunApp: Step1
RunApp -->> Theme: theme_set(theme_custom_teal_ecdx())
Note over RunApp: Step2
RunApp -->> RunApp: Check a1.rds exist?
alt a1.rds exist 
RunApp -->> RunApp: load Cache Object
RunApp -->> User: Return list(UI, server)
end
Note over RunApp: Step3
RunApp -->> Data: read_parquet_data(study, env)
Data -->> RunApp: data_list (14 fields) 
Note over RunApp: Step4
RunApp -->> Settings: get(paste0(study, "settings"))$new(data_list)
Settings -->> RunApp: s1(Settings instance)
RunApp -->> Settings: s1$update_settings()
Note right of Settings: Study Specific UI Choices
RunApp -->> Settings: s1$update_attributes()
Note right of Settings: Color/shape maping
RunApp -->> Settings: s1$save_attributes()
Note right of Settings: persist to attributes.rds
Note over RunApp: Step5
RunApp -->> App: get(study, "App")$new(study, data_list, a1)
App -->> RunApp: a1(App instance)
RunApp -->> App: a1$update_modules()
Note right of App: Study-Specific module changes
RunApp -->> App: a1$create_app()
Note over RunApp: Step6
App -->> Teal: teal::init(data, modules, header, footer)
Teal -->> RunApp:list(ui, server)
RunApp -->> User: shinyApp(ui, server)
Note over RunApp: Step7
```
### R6 Class Hierrchy
Show the inheritance pattern for settings and app classes, how each study inherits and overrides specific methods.

```{mermaid}
classDiagram
   class Settings {
       +derived_data
       +arm_vars
       +atributes
       +data_obj
       +initialize(data_list)
       +define_default_settings()
       +updates_settings()
       +update_atributes()
       +save_attributes(path)
       +make_dynamic_choices(df_name, param_var) 
   }

   class App {
    +header
    +footer
    +code
    +data
    +app
    +settings
    +modules
    +study
    +initialize(study, data, settings, code)
    +define_default_modules()
    +update_modules()
    +create_app()
    +create_cdisc_datasets()
    +create_header()
    +create_footer() 
   }
   class 123Settings {
    +updates_settings()
    +update_atributes()
   }
   class 123App {
    +update_modules()
   }
   class 456Settings {
    +updates_settings()
    +update_atributes()
   }
   class 456App {
    +update_modules()
   }
   class AnotherStudySettings {
    +updates_settings()
    +update_atributes()
   }
   class AnotherStudyApp {
    +update_modules()
   }
   Settings <-- 123Settings : inherits
   Settings <-- 456Settings : inherits
   Settings <-- AnotherStudySettings : inherits
   App <-- 123App: inherits
   App <-- 456App: inherits
   App <-- AnotherStudyApp: inherits

   Settings --> App: Passed via constructor
   

```
```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  subgraph Sources["Source data"]
    SAS["SAS7BAT/XPT <br> SDTM domains"]
    ADAM["ADAM paraquet/SAS <br> pre-derived"]
  end

  subgraph Mapper["cdex.mapper Ppackage"]
    direction TB
    CFG["study.yaml<br>+ spec.csv]
    PIPE["Two-phase Pipeline<br>map_study]
    CFG --> PIPE
  end
  SAS --> Mapper
  ADAM --> Mapper
style Sources fill: #fff3e0, stroke: #4CAF50
```
